identity.name: NDR — C2 Beaconing EAL Validation
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-001. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1071.001. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-001. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1071.001. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-NDR-001.
UC: NGFW Enhanced Application Log Validation / TC: Periodic HTTP Beacon Detection via EAL Analytics.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-NDR-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Deploy EAL traffic simulator pod and confirm registry
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli list-plugins | jq -e '.total >= 4'
# step-2: Launch dry-run campaign — confirm safety policy holds
cat > /tmp/c2-beacon-dry.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-NDR-001
name: "NDR validation — C2 beacon dry run"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: false
target_allowlist: []
dry_run: true
tags: [ndr, c2-beacon, eal]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: c2_http_beacon
    params:
      target_url: http://testmynids.org/uid/index.html
      iterations: 5
      sleep_seconds: 2
      jitter_pct: 25
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/c2-beacon-dry.yml
# step-3: Live campaign — periodic beacon to authorised test endpoint
cat > /tmp/c2-beacon-live.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-NDR-001
name: "NDR validation — C2 beacon live"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - testmynids.org
dry_run: false
tags: [ndr, c2-beacon, eal]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: c2_http_beacon
    params:
      target_url: http://testmynids.org/uid/index.html
      iterations: 12
      sleep_seconds: 30
      jitter_pct: 25
      method: GET
      dga_query_param: true
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/c2-beacon-live.yml --live

expected_artifacts.description: Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
